html.hero.subtitle: Corbelle is the boutique advisory firm for leaders navigating high-stakes technology decisions.

text.hero.title: When you are making a decision that really matters, who do you speak to?
text.problem.intro: There’s a kind of pressure that doesn’t get talked about much.
text.problem.copy1: You’re leading an organisation of fifty, a hundred, or two hundred people. A vendor has sent you a major proposal, an investor is asking about your AI strategy. The decisions are significant. The spend is real. Your political capital is at risk.
text.problem.copy2: You could call a Big 4 firm but you’re not a big enough for them to give you a senior partner. You could bring in a niche development shop, but they’ll solve the technical problem without touching the strategic one.
text.problem.copy3: With deadlines fast approaching, and no way to side-step the scenario, the weight of the decision is crippling you.
text.practice1.title: Clear-eyed technology strategy.
text.practice1.copy: Tech reviews, AI audits, leadership education and operating model work for sub-500 person businesses. No stake in the vendor. No incentive to overcomplicate the answer.
text.practice2.title: Decision advisory with career implications.
text.practice2.copy: Not coaching, a partnership. A thinking partner who stays in the room throughout the process. For leaders under decision pressure.
text.quote1.copy: “This is the kind of thinking partnership I didn’t know I was missing until I had it.”
text.quote2.copy: “I walked into the board presentation knowing exactly what I was going to say and why. That’s not something I’ve had before.”
text.quote3.copy: “Brendan’s value isn’t the report. It’s the thinking that happens before anyone writes anything.”
text.closing.copy: Corbelle works with a small number of clients at any one time.
